name: Wizard Lineage
overview: A young man named Gondes felt depressed because he was shunned by many people because of his special abilities. Even so, he is actually a great wizard. Behind the story of Gondes' life, a group of dark sorcerers who are hungry for power are trying to obtain the most powerful magic weapon in the world. Gondes, together with his mentor and friend, David, must now race against time to stop the efforts of the group of dark sorcerers who are David's former students. Together with friends like Pak Sulap, Riana, Marleen, and so on, can they overcome these problems?
